title: How to Trade the Cash Secured Put
description:

*🪐 Free Jupyter Notebook Access 👇*
https://github.com/romanmichaelpaolucci/Quant-Guild-Library/blob/main/2026%20Video%20Lectures/113.%20How%20to%20Trade%20the%20Cash%20Secured%20Puts/httcc.ipynb

*👤 Video Setting Up Interactive Brokers 👇*
https://youtu.be/7hezNf49iKc

*🔗 How to Read Options Chains 👇*
https://youtu.be/RrRbz6oXwxE

TL;DW Executive Summary:
   - We began by reviewing the fundamental characteristics of European put options, focusing on how put option payoffs work at expiration and what they mean for both buyers (long) and sellers (short)
  - The lesson then shifted to the cash secured put strategy, explaining how selling (writing) a put option requires setting aside enough cash to buy the underlying stock if assigned, and how this shapes cash flows and total profit/loss—highlighting the unique risk and reward profile associated with this approach
  - Interactive charts and numerical examples illustrated the mechanics of the strategy, showing how total P&L evolves over different market scenarios and underscoring the need to understand both the income potential and downside obligation when selling cash secured puts
  - Finally, we explored when and why a trader might use the cash secured put—covering best practices, possible drawbacks, and how this strategy can fit into an overall investment, risk management, and income generation plan for a portfolio

I hope you enjoyed, and I hope you learned something!

- Roman
___________________________________________

17:29 - Executing & Managing the Position
